creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Thu Apr 18 12:06:10 2013
New Revision: 316037
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/316037

Log:
  - Update to 1.21 [1]
  - Convert to optionsng
  
  PR:		ports/177941 [1]
  Submitted by:	Sebastien Santoro <dereckson@espace-win.org> (maintainer, from another address)
  Feature safe:	yes

Modified:
  head/devel/git-review/Makefile
  head/devel/git-review/distinfo
  head/devel/git-review/pkg-plist

Modified: head/devel/git-review/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/git-review/Makefile	Thu Apr 18 11:19:13 2013	(r316036)
+++ head/devel/git-review/Makefile	Thu Apr 18 12:06:10 2013	(r316037)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	git-review
-PORTVERSION=	1.20
+PORTVERSION=	1.21
 CATEGORIES=	devel python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	source/g/${PORTNAME}
@@ -19,13 +19,15 @@ NO_BUILD=	yes
 
 MAN1=		git-review.1
 
+.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
+
 do-install:
 	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/git-review ${PREFIX}/bin/git-review
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/git-review.1 ${PREFIX}/man/man1
-.if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
+.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
 	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README.md ${DOCSDIR}
-	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/HACKING ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/HACKING.rst ${DOCSDIR}
 	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/AUTHORS ${DOCSDIR}
 .endif
 

Modified: head/devel/git-review/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/git-review/distinfo	Thu Apr 18 11:19:13 2013	(r316036)
+++ head/devel/git-review/distinfo	Thu Apr 18 12:06:10 2013	(r316037)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (git-review-1.20.tar.gz) = c42857cb5f9f36e09b9dbb933a654bb89dc4ba9e5b4d25caf6bb813002ecbd10
-SIZE (git-review-1.20.tar.gz) = 16020
+SHA256 (git-review-1.21.tar.gz) = 82529b1894a99003a525c80b4b8ef7c8a979f107bb7a166ca2705747e1372faf
+SIZE (git-review-1.21.tar.gz) = 23732

Modified: head/devel/git-review/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/git-review/pkg-plist	Thu Apr 18 11:19:13 2013	(r316036)
+++ head/devel/git-review/pkg-plist	Thu Apr 18 12:06:10 2013	(r316037)
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 bin/git-review
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/AUTHORS
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/HACKING
+%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/HACKING.rst
 %%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.md
 %%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
